recommendations.title: Rebels of the Neon God
recommendations.overview: In Taipei, four youths face alienation, loneliness, and moments of existential crisis amidst a series of minor crimes.

recommendations.title: The Wayward Cloud
recommendations.overview: Hsiao-Kang, now working as an adult movie actor, meets Shiang-chyi once again. Meanwhile, the city of Taipei faces a water shortage that makes the sales of watermelons skyrocket.

recommendations.title: What Time Is It There?
recommendations.overview: A street vendor with a grim home-life forges a connection with a young woman on her way to Paris.

recommendations.title: Vive L'Amour
recommendations.overview: Three lonely young denizens of Taipei unknowingly share an apartment: May, a real estate agent who uses it for her sexual affairs; Ah-jung, her current lover; and Hsiao-kang, who's stolen the key and uses the apartment as a retreat.

recommendations.title: The Truman Show
recommendations.overview: In a picture-perfect seaside town, an insurance salesman begins to realize that his entire existence may be staged and observed by a vast unseen audience as part of a reality TV show.

recommendations.title: To Each His Own Cinema

recommendations.title: Hotel Mumbai
recommendations.overview: Mumbai, India, November 26, 2008. While several terrorists spread hatred and death through the city, others attack the Taj Mahal Palace Hotel. Both hotel staff and guests risk their lives, making unthinkable sacrifices to protect themselves and keep

recommendations.title: The Tiger
recommendations.overview: In 1925 Korea, Japanese rulers demand the last remaining tiger be killed. The tiger easily defeats his pursuers until a legendary hunter takes him on.

recommendations.title: Eat Drink Man Woman
recommendations.overview: Retired and widowed Chinese master chef Chu lives in modern day Taipei, with his three attractive daughters, all of whom are unattached. Soon, each daughter encounters a new man in their lives. When these new relationships blossom, stereotypes are br

recommendations.title: Russian Ark
recommendations.overview: A ghost and a French marquis wander through the Winter Palace in St Petersburg, encountering scenes from many different periods of its history.
